entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 206,532Chapters: 25/28Kudos: 203

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,036Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 69

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Rape/Non-Con
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

  • Diapers

entry.title: your head'll collapse
entry.summary:
Author: Mapping_Marauders

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,389Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: "Eddie," Bucks says softly, carefully. Eddie can practically hear the frown in her voice, the concern she's trying to pack away and seal behind a locked door. "What's wrong?" "'S hot," Eddie repeats. A broken record because her brain isn't working and somebody needs to go put out all the raging fires before they swallow up everything.  "Hot? You're shivering, Eds." Eddie frowns. Concentrates and finds that Buck is right. She is shivering, tremors running down her spine, goosebumps decorating the length of her arms. "Oh." Buck sighs, leaning over Eddie to stroke a hand down her back, a little too warm but comforting all the same. "Eds, come here." "'M tired." "I know. I know, just—I need to make sure you're okay," Buck reasons, voice deliberately level, but there's an edge to her tone, one that Eddie recognizes. One that means she's scared, for some reason, and trying to hide it, for some other reason Eddie can't work out right now. And if there's one thing Eddie responds to, it's a frightened Buck.  Or,Eddie is feverish and Buck still hasn't processed Bobby's death.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: amourissima (you used to call me comme ça)
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,690Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 472

Summary: “Buck, seriously.” Eddie catches his eye, staring intently, attempting to beam the anxiety straight into Buck’s brain. “I know we’re both playing it cool, but… How are you not freaking out right now? I’m freaking out right now.”  Buck quirks an eyebrow. “I thought you didn’t panic.”  “I don’t,” Eddie insists. “But I woke up in the wrong body this morning, and I had to—” He lowers his voice, ducking closer to Buck. “I touched your dick, man. Which—you know.”  A violation of boundaries. A line that can’t be uncrossed. Something Eddie feels deeply guilty about. “You touched my dick?” Buck asks, approximately one billion decibels louder than necessary.  The room around them stills.Or: Buck and Eddie switch bodies. Chaos ensues.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Broken Into Fractions
entry.summary:
Author: kikibridges13

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,431Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 21

Summary: “I’m still your best friend, Eds,” he says. “I’m fine.”Eddie steps closer, lowering his voice so it doesn’t carry beyond them.“No,” he says, brown eyes meeting blue. “You’re not.”There’s a long beat that stretches between them. The airport continues to hum around them, but it feels distant, like it’s happening all around them and leaving their own bubble out of the chaos. Eddie watches as Buck’s eyes flicker between the three of them, the three truths that he couldn’t ignore. All standing firm, refusing to let him walk away.His chest rises and falls with a slow, controlled breath. Buck stares at Eddie, really looking at him for the first time in Eddie didn’t even know how long. Eyes full of hurt, betrayal, but underneath all of it, fear.“…I hate you,” Buck says roughly.Eddie nods once, accepting it without hesitation.“Yeah,” he says quietly. “I know.”POST 9x13 "Mother's Boy."Eddie has noticed the way Buck is slowly pulling away from everybody. With the help of Maddie and Athena, he decides to take his best friend to the one person who can help him, even it's beyond the grave.

entry.title: and as it shatters, let me shatter into you
entry.summary:
Author: buckmeetsboy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,835Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 199

Summary: After a long moment he said, rougher than he intended, “I should’ve pushed harder.” Maddie didn’t interrupt. “I knew he wasn’t okay.” Eddie rubbed a hand over the back of his neck. “Maybe not how bad, but I knew. And I let him tell me he was fine because…” He exhaled hard. “Because I wanted it to be true.” The confession sat between them, stripped bare. Maddie was quiet for so long Eddie wondered if he’d said the wrong thing after all. Then she leaned forward, elbows on her knees. “Eddie,” she said softly, “if loving Buck meant always knowing how to save him, none of us would ever sleep again.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: funeral for heartache
entry.summary:
Author: andallofmyheart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,111Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: “And Eddie?” She asks pointedly, her eyebrows raised high. He sighs and looks back towards the fire pit, where now the remains of the logs lay deep in soot. He replies, “Eddie is good, I’m glad he’s here.” “Have you asked him how long he’s staying?” “No, Pepa dropped Chris off yesterday with a few suitcases. I figure they will stay a few more days.” Buck says. He doesn’t want to know, doesn’t want to think about when Eddie inevitably decides that Buck is healed enough to live on his own again. Maddie sighs deeply, like she’s exhausted from the conversation. “Talk to him Buck,” She says, “If you ask him to stay, he will.” or: buck and eddie are both bad at asking for what they want, but they will figure it out together.

entry.title: Sticky Situations
entry.summary:
Author: Souti

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,614Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: After joking about how the universe seems to orchestrate ridiculous, telenovela-style romantic tropes for other people, firefighters Buck and Eddie suddenly find themselves trapped in their very own rom-com. From slipping into highly compromising positions on a wet floor to getting stuck in a dim supply closet, cosmic coincidences start piling up around them.

entry.title: tea, midnight whispers, and answers found on a couch
entry.summary:
Author: brewrosemilk

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,622Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 204

Summary: “The whole, uh…” Buck has to take a beat to swallow; he’s not smiling anymore—Eddie isn’t either. They’re just breathing. Stalling—not because they’re nervous, but because it feels good—stalling; soaking this in. This very moment, right here; the second they do this, everything is going to change. Buck can’t wait for everything to change, but this is good, too—sitting at the very top of a rollercoaster, just waiting for the drop. The rush. “…whole confessing your, uh…” Buck continues—eyes falling closed; they’re too close to see anything now, anyway. Eddie’s hand has stopped combing through his curls, instead supporting the back of his head above where his forearm is doing the same. Holding him. “…confessing your mutual, undying love thing. ‘S usually sealed with a kiss.” If his chin twitches a fraction of an inch up, and his bottom lip drops just a little bit, he thinks he’s allowed. “Eddie…” he breathes, when an entire second passes and he doesn’t move. Or speak. “You’re letting me take the jump off the bridge?” Eddie jokes through a whisper—almost as if they’re two teenagers, giggling under the covers at a sleepover way past their bedtime.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,822Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 5

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: Your Love is My Drug
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,443Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 127

Summary: Buck knows it’s not sustainable by the fourth night, when he wakes up sweating and unable to breathe, one hand clutching his ribs where she’d stuck him the first time with the cattle prod and the other reaching to turn on the lamp at his bedside. It’s been one week since he got back, so four sleepless nights puts him firmly in the "more bad than good" territory. What the hell is he supposed to do about all this shit? He alluded to therapy when he talked with Eddie at work the other day, but he’s not going to do that. Therapy is totally hit or miss for him. He’s been to two therapists, one was a miss, one a hit, which means he’s due for another miss. He’s sure as hell not going to talk to Maddie about it, because that’d be, like, super triggering or something. She just got over her own kidnapping a few years ago. And who else, Eddie? Eddie had a traumatic experience in New Mexico as well; he doesn’t need to be responsible for Buck’s too. But the fact of the matter is, something’s got to change. So, Buck decides to start self-medicating. ~ or canon compliant up until s9ep14 (DIY), after that it's just angst and hurt and maybe occasional comfort

entry.title: Load-Bearing
entry.summary:
Author: IamJenifer

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,351Chapters: 37/37Kudos: 11

Summary: "I can't go to two different houses, Eddie. I just can't. I need to be able to see you. I need to know where Christopher is every time I open my eyes." The Specialist in Buck is flagging. The adrenaline is gone, replaced by the grit under his fingernails and the terrifying realization that "home" isn't a building in Glendale—it’s the people who didn't let go when the world started to shake. Between heirloom tomatoes, punny turnip t-shirts, and the silent weight of what they almost lost, Buck and Eddie have to decide if they're rebuilding their old lives or building something entirely new. Something solid. Something that can hold the weight of all of them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Christopher Diaz
  • Buck & Maddie Buckley (Siblings)
  • Post-disaster recovery
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Emotional Hurt/Comfort
  • Domestic Bliss (eventually)
  • Caregiving
  • Canonical Universe
  • POV Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • POV Eddie Diaz

  • Heirloom Tomatoes as a Love Language
  • Found Family
  • Building a Life
  • Protective Eddie Diaz
  • Competent Buck
  • Structural Integrity as a Metaphor

entry.title: Let me tell you a story (about a boy and a boy)
entry.summary:
Author: Ienjoyeatingfrenchfries

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,141Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: If not obvious from the title this is based off of the song “the story” by Conan Gray. Basically Buck and Eddie fell in love in highschool and eddies parents found out and moved Eddie back to Texas. My first fic so pray for me that I don’t get the curse just yet

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Everything connects to Buck
entry.summary:
Author: Readitwatchitwriteit

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,714Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Buck is Bobby's nephew and came to live with Bobby and Marcy at 12 years old after Danny and Mads moved out of the house. Someone called CPS and Evan was removed from the house to be raised by Bobby and Marcy. This is that story, Bobby Jr (RJ) and Brooke (B) survive the fire and live with their cousin Danny for a while well their dad and Buck become who they are. Chapter 1 is the story of Buck (Evan) growing up with Bobby, Marcy, Danny, and Kira (Danny's amazingly kickass girlfriend) caring for him. Maddie is still there as well, but more a s a background character in the first few chapters. Buck and Eddie will get together, but it's gonna be a few chapters before he's even introduced. I will try and follow most major plotlines, but it is told more in snap shots then flowing scenes. Please be aware of this! There is a mention of some Lonestar characters in here as well.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 160,433Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 96

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.
